title: Chhattisgarh High Court designates 11 lawyers as Senior Advocates
description: The High Court of Chhattisgarh has designated eleven lawyers as Senior Advocates.The decision was approved by the Full Court in its meeting held on April 28, 2026. The advocates who have been conferred the gown are:1. Shailendra Dubey2. Ranvir Singh Marhas3. Hamida Siddiqui4. Yashwant Thakur5. Anoop Majumdar6. Neelabh Dubey7. Amrito Das8. Mateen Siddiqui9. Naushina Afrin Ali10. Arvind Shrivastava11. Tarendra Kumar Jha12 lawyers had submitted applications for the senior gown. The High Court had n
